assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 69-72: 'JQL: project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. ready-for-qa.md lines 8-9 confirm the same JQL. Both include labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA).

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 17-18: 'The query returned 3 candidate issues. Each must be evaluated by inspecting its issuelinks array for linked Tasks with link type "Depend" and checking whether ALL such tasks are Done or Closed.' Lines 22-26 define the filtering criteria: 'It has linked Tasks with link type "Depend" (remediation tasks exist)' and 'ALL linked remediation Tasks are Done or Closed'. For each candidate, the linked tasks and their statuses are enumerated (TC-9020: TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed; TC-9023: TC-9024 Done, TC-9025 In Progress; TC-9026: none).

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 79-82: TC-9020 appears in the 'Qualified for Ready for QA' table with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' and the note 'All linked remediation Tasks for TC-9020 are completed'. ready-for-qa.md lines 42-53 confirm: 'TC-9021: Done (completed), TC-9022: Closed (completed)' and 'Result: INCLUDED in Ready for QA.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 88: TC-9023 appears in 'Excluded from Ready for QA' with 'Reason: TC-9025 still In Progress -- remediation not complete'. ready-for-qa.md lines 68-76: 'TC-9024: Done (completed), TC-9025: In Progress (still open -- remediation is not yet complete)' and 'Result: EXCLUDED from Ready for QA. Remediation is still in progress.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 89: TC-9026 appears in 'Excluded from Ready for QA' with 'Reason: No linked Tasks with type "Depend" -- no remediation to verify'. ready-for-qa.md lines 82-89: 'The issue has no linked Tasks with link type "Depend". There are no remediation tasks to verify' and 'Result: EXCLUDED from Ready for QA. No linked remediation Tasks with type "Depend" exist.'

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 78-82: The 'Qualified for Ready for QA' table includes columns 'Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks' with TC-9020 showing 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md lines 103-107: The summary table includes 'Depend Links' and 'Remediation Tasks' columns showing each linked task and its status.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 83: 'All linked remediation Tasks for TC-9020 are completed... Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md line 55: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All remediation tasks have been completed and the CVE fix is ready for QA verification.' Line 108: 'Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.'
